controlled_change: apply Provider strict JSON Schema response constraints to both arms to eliminate the v3 multiple-JSON framing failure; semantics and flat whole_candidate_claim representation unchanged
estimand_scope: semantic and representation feasibility on the frozen one-Claim Pilot frame; not general multi-claim Atomic localization superiority
candidate_arm: one whole-Candidate support label plus rationale
atomic_arm: one flat whole_candidate_claim operation with materiality, claim support, rationale, and deterministic Candidate aggregation

atomic_operations.whole_candidate_claim: the only authorized operation for this frozen single-proposition Pilot adapter; adapter assigns exact full Candidate span

aggregation.candidate_reference_label: claim_support_label because the sole claim is material
